design.description: Stage-2 PO lifecycle automation in FMT OS where SHP approves a requested PO from Review PO tab and verifies transition to approval pending/map flow.

flows.name: SHP approves requested PO from Review PO
steps: Verify PO is in Approval Pending stage or visible in Map SO

business_rules: Only requested POs are actionable for SHP approval from Review PO tab.
Approve action may require a confirmation click.
Approved PO should transition out of Review PO stage.
validations: Target PO number is found using exact text match.
Post-approval state is validated by Approval Pending indicator or Map SO visibility.
edge_cases: Target PO number missing in environment configuration.
Target PO not visible for SHP role in Review PO list.

selector_hints.notes: Should be active before approval flow.

selector_hints.suggested_selector: input[placeholder='Search by PO#, Supplier Name & ID']

selector_hints.notes: Use visible candidate in details view.
